caveat: Seed corpus is now measured (ADR-149). Re-measure quarterly via `scripts/benchmark-seed-corpus.mjs --live`. To regenerate the embeddings (not the scores), use `scripts/gen-seed-corpus.mjs`.
notes: Rows persist `task` + `tier` directly — benchmark-seed-corpus.mjs reads these from the row instead of regenerating from templates (the v1 approach).
Embeddings are real 384-dim semantic vectors from MiniLM, not synthetic deterministic projections.
